task_question: 结合制度和业务数据,核查以R000020为线索的重复报销异常,返回异常ID和记录ID集合。

scope.rule: Article 10 - 同一发票最多报销1次

policy_questions.question: Which policy version applies to R000020 (expense_date 2025-01-05) and R004203 (expense_date 2025-04-10)?
policy_questions.clause_text: 同一发票最多报销1次。发现同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现的,应认定为重复报销风险。

data_questions.question: Is invoice FP202500000020 used in multiple expense records?
data_questions.findings: INV000020 appears in R000020 and R004203, usage_count=2

evidence_requirements: Reused invoice list from find_reused_invoices confirming INV000020 usage_count=2

execution_steps.findings: Same invoice FP202500000020 in R000020 and R004203

reasons: Involves reused invoice batch lookup across records
Requires date-boundary check for policy applicability

subagent_plan.reason: Direct evidence available; complexity 2 with single-rule, single-policy scope. Both records already retrieved. No professional subagent needed.

stopping_conditions: All records using invoice INV000020 identified and verified
Policy applicability confirmed for both records
No valid exemptions or exceptions found for the duplicate usage
